name: gb200_nvl72
_comment: GB200 NVL72: Blackwell B200, 192 GB HBM3E @ 8 TB/s, FP16 dense 2250 TFLOPS/GPU per the framework convention (peak_flops_TF stores FP16 dense per chip; lower precisions scale linearly by bytes_per_param: FP8 = 4500, FP4 = 9000), NVLink5 1.8 TB/s bidir (900 GB/s single-direction). All 72 GPUs in a single NVLink domain via 9 NVSwitch Gen3 chips (7.2 TB/s single-dir each, 64.8 TB/s system aggregate). eta=1.0 means no efficiency discount applied by default.
